name: detectors: each detector conforms to §2.2 detector contract (--json, --paths, --dry-run, exit codes 0/1/2/3, set -euo pipefail)
command: for d in a11y-axe bundle-budget rsc-boundary exhaustive-deps; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/$d.sh" --help 2>&1 | grep -E -- "--json.*--paths.*--dry-run" >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL $d missing contract flags" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
